creator: jhale@FreeBSD.org
text: Thank you very much for your update of Qt Creator, Florian. We at kde@ greatly appreciate you beta testing and submitting yet another quality update. While the previous version of Qt Creator built with Qt 6.7.0., and not to negate your work in any way, this one doesn't without the addition of USES=localbase:ldflags. I'm still in the process of investigating the reason for this regression.
